text.title: Research Repository Operations Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Research Repository Operations. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 30% of studies missing tags after 6 months; search fails.
antipattern.fix: Weekly tagging backfill of new-in-week + 10% of untagged backlog.

antipattern.symptom: Two interviews with 'John Smith' merged into one record.
antipattern.fix: Hash (source_url + date + segment) for dedup; reject name-only matches.

antipattern.symptom: Ex-employee retains admin access 9 months after off-boarding.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory quarterly access review; automate revocation on HR off-boarding webhook.
